race.comment: ROCK 'N' THE JAM (5) is on resumption after a long break. His last start win back in February last year was very strong and his recent trial at Belmont was solid. He looks ready to run well on resumption and he can return on a winning note. MALLETIER (10) missed by 1L last start over the 1000m at Belmont but should be better suited coming out in trip now. The winkers go on for the first time and Pike sticking is a good push for his chances. Needs some luck from out wide, but he drops in weight and can play a leading role. CAMERA ACTION (6) comes back in trip today which looks a good move with Chris Parnham hopping in the saddle. She draws well here and she can sit much closer today. A forward showing is on the cards. GOLDEN VALE (2) will be better for the fresh run at Pinjarra and is a second-up winner in the past. Worth including. SNIPPY WHICH (4) won well last start and is not to be discounted on that effort.
